summary: First full test iteration on Cleaning Tasks app. Backend: 29/29 pytest tests passed covering auth, settings, seeded lists, CRUD for all simple kinds (task-types/houses/stations/persons), task creation, all 6 status transitions incl. reason fields, archive-now, archive date listing and per-date retrieval. Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): landing renders, admin login with admin123 routes to /admin, create-task flow submits, tablet shows task, ANNEHMEN turns card yellow (ANGENOMMEN), NICHT ERLEDIGT opens reason modal and turns card red with reason displayed. WebSocket real-time broadcast verified: new task posted from another client appears on tablet within ~4s with no manual refresh.

minor.issue: Endpoint exists but is a no-op (returns {ok:true}); seeding is actually done in @app.on_event('startup'). Consider removing endpoint or making it re-seed.

issues: Horizontal card layout (cardLeft 130px + cardRight 160px) leaves only ~100px for the center column, causing task_type text like 'Grundreiniger' and labels HAUS/STATION to wrap one character per line. Tablet view is designed for wide screens, but there is no responsive fallback or min-width guard; if a user accidentally opens /tablet on a phone, it looks broken. Consider adding a min-width breakpoint or stacking layout on narrow screens.

react_native_issues.issue: Warning: 'style.resizeMode is deprecated. Please use props.resizeMode' (logo Image uses resizeMode in StyleSheet). Non-blocking deprecation warning.

Console warning: "The action 'GO_BACK' was not handled by any navigator" after submitting a task from /admin/create because router.back() is called when /admin/create was reached via direct navigation. In normal flow (user taps 'Neu' on /admin) it's fine, but safer to use router.replace('/admin').

action_items: Consider making /tablet responsive (stack card layout) or add a min-width notice for phone viewports.
Replace Image style.resizeMode with props.resizeMode in /app/frontend/app/tablet/index.tsx to silence RN warning.
In /app/frontend/app/admin/create.tsx, after submit change router.back() to router.replace('/admin') to avoid GO_BACK warning on direct-navigation path.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py stores ADMIN_TOKEN as a fixed string 'admin-session-token'. Anyone who reads the code can craft an admin request. Acceptable for the user's 'simple password' requirement, but note that changing the admin password does NOT invalidate already-issued tokens.
PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status has no auth. Per product spec the tablet is public, so this is intentional, but it means anyone with the URL can change status. OK for internal LAN use.
server.py is 355 lines - healthy; no split needed yet.
_id is properly excluded from all Mongo queries (projection {_id:0}).
All endpoints use Pydantic validation and return proper 400/401/404 codes.
seed_data_creation: Test persons with 'TEST_' prefix were created and deleted per-test; one 'UI-TEST Aufgabe' task and one 'WS-MARKER-*' task were created via UI/API and left as today's tasks (they will be auto-archived at midnight UTC).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid. Admin token is static string 'admin-session-token'. Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Tablet uses WebSocket at /api/ws and re-fetches on any {type: tasks_updated|settings_updated|persons_updated} broadcast. For in-browser cross-origin POSTs from scripts, use page.evaluate with same-origin fetch; direct python urllib gets blocked by preview proxy (403). Known minor: tablet layout breaks at <500px viewport (not a priority unless user asks).
